case_title: ABDULLAH YVONNE MRS VS WESTERN CABLE SYSTEMS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDULLAH YVONNE MRS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN CABLE SYSTEMS IMPROPER VENUE CASE IS TO BE TRANSFERED TO DALY CITY SMALL CLAIMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $385.18 FILED BY ABDULLAH YVONNE MRS AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN CABLE SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN CABLE SYSTEMS
